text:
I'm sorry the reset email isn't coming through — since you've already checked spam and tried twice over the past hour, let's dig into it further.

Can you confirm the email address you're using to request the reset, so we can verify it matches what's on file? Also worth checking if your email provider allows Novig to be whitelisted, as some filters block automated messages beyond spam folders.

If the email on file is confirmed correct and still nothing arrives, we'll route this to our security team to verify your identity and assist with the reset directly.

Novig Support
